steps.name: Add onDeleteStaple callback to MetadataBottomSheet edit mode
steps.criteria: When MetadataBottomSheet is in edit mode and onDeleteStaple prop is provided, a Delete Staple button is shown; tapping it calls onDeleteStaple with the stapleId and dismisses the sheet
steps.scenario_name: edit mode shows delete button that calls onDeleteStaple

steps.name: Wire delete in HomeView to remove staple from library and trip
steps.criteria: HomeView passes onDeleteStaple to MetadataBottomSheet that calls stapleLibrary.remove(id) and removes the item from the active trip; items list updates after deletion
steps.scenario_name: deleting staple removes from library and trip
